Description: A single-family detached house located in Shenzhen, China. The building footprint is approximately 11.2 m (east-west) by 11.2 m (north-south), rectangular, with the long axis rotated 0 degrees from north. Total gross floor area is about 125.0 m^2 spread over 1 floor(s), giving roughly 125.0 m^2 per floor. Floor-to-floor height is 2.9 m. The building is divided into 2 thermal zones in total (about 2 per floor). Typical space layout: open-plan living + dining + kitchen. Window-to-wall ratio is approximately 10% on exterior walls, with windows distributed on all four facades. Model all zones with appropriate constructions, glazing, occupancy, lighting, equipment and HVAC (ideal loads) so the IDF runs in EnergyPlus without errors.
